project_context.vibe: Cinematic, intimate, immersive. No generic AI purple gradients. Deep romantic tones.

typography.pairing_strategy: Use Playfair Display (Italicized, large, font-bold) for massive emotional hooks (e.g. text-5xl/text-6xl). Use Outfit (tracking-tight) for stats, progress bars, UI elements, and buttons.

background.texture_instruction: MANDATORY: Add a CSS SVG noise/grain overlay (opacity 0.08, pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay) spanning the screen to remove digital flatness and make it feel like velvet/film.

spacing_and_layout.global: Mobile-first responsive. Container must be h-screen w-full overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative.
spacing_and_layout.safe_areas: Top padding must account for the stories progress bar (pt-12). Bottom padding (pb-12) for interactive elements.

motion_and_interactions.stats_counter: Use Framer Motion 'useMotionValue', 'useTransform', and 'animate' to run numbers from 0 to final value smoothly.

slide_definitions.name: StartSlide
slide_definitions.layout: Centered flex column, heavy negative space. 'O Nosso Wrapped' in Playfair Display text-5xl md:text-7xl italic.
slide_definitions.interactions: Pulsing 'Começar a Retrospectiva' button (animate scale [1, 1.05, 1] infinitely). On click: unlock audio placeholder, advance slide.

slide_definitions.name: StatsSlide
slide_definitions.layout: Staggered vertical list. Header 'Este ano nós fomos longe...' at top.
slide_definitions.interactions: Numbers count from 0 to final value. Elements stagger fade-in and slide-up.

slide_definitions.name: MusicQuizSlide
slide_definitions.layout: Question heading 'Mas teve uma música que não saiu do nosso repeat...' at top. 3 large crystal-glassmorphism buttons stacked vertically.
slide_definitions.interactions: Wrong click: Shake animation and bg turns red. Right click: Canvas-confetti overlay, audio volume visual bump, auto-advance after 2.5s.

slide_definitions.name: PhotosSlide
slide_definitions.layout: Overlapping polaroid-style rotated divs. Gradient placeholders acting as images with 🤍 centered. Bottom floating 'Te amo' button.
slide_definitions.interactions: Images animate in with slight rotation (e.g. -6deg, 4deg) and scale. Clicking 'Te amo' triggers raining hearts via canvas-confetti.

stories_progress_bar.style: Absolute top-2 left-0 w-full flex gap-1 px-2 z-50
stories_progress_bar.behavior: Each segment maps to a slide. Fills horizontally based on slide duration (default 7s). Tap right to advance, tap left to go back. Pause timer on screen hold/press (if feasible).

audio_player.behavior: Invisible placeholder <audio src='[INSIRA AQUI]' loop /> unlocked on first slide interaction.

implementation_instructions: DO NOT USE SHADCN CARDS OR PRE-BUILT UI. Build pure custom HTML/Tailwind + Framer Motion `motion.div` components to maintain fluid, bespoke cinematic transitions. Follow the dark shifting gradient + noise texture strictly. Ensure all textual content uses exactly [INSIRA AQUI]. Keep all files as .js or .jsx. Enforce optical clarity on glassmorphism panels (backdrop-blur-xl).
